name: insurance_mutual_aid_request_marrowbridge_st_lt
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Insurance, the situation tagged internally around insurance mutual aid request marrowbridge st lt has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elena Dubois
agents.identity: I am Elena Dubois, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Insurance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Ravi Ishikawa, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Insurance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on long term.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on long term for immediate traction on short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Elena Dubois must choose under short term versus long term. What does Elena Dubois do?
